_comment: Delirium reward cluster types. Each type biases the loot dropped by Delirium encounters in that map.
mechanic_note: Apply a Delirium Orb to a map to add a Delirium reward cluster. Clusters stack up to 5×. Stay in the fog longer to maximise rewards — the reward counter fills as you kill monsters near the mirror.
simulacrum_note: Collect 300 Simulacrum Splinters (any mix of types) to form a Simulacrum map fragment, regardless of reward cluster type.

reward_types.name: Currency
reward_types.description: Drops currency orbs, stacked currency, and high-value base orbs.
reward_types.high_value_drops: Chaos Orbs, Divine Orbs, Exalted Orbs, Mirror Shards
reward_types.notes: Most commonly stacked reward type. Good base choice when unsure.

reward_types.name: Jewels
reward_types.description: Drops jewels (Cobalt, Crimson, Viridian), Cluster Jewels, and Abyss Jewels.
reward_types.high_value_drops: Large Cluster Jewels (especially 8-passive), Megalomaniac, Watcher's Eye
reward_types.best_for: Cluster Jewel farming, Watcher's Eye hunting
reward_types.notes: Cluster Jewel rolls vary wildly in value. Watcher's Eye requires active Zana map device mod, not delirium.

reward_types.name: Maps
reward_types.description: Drops maps of equal or higher tier, unique maps, and map-relevant currency.
reward_types.high_value_drops: Tier 16 maps, Unique maps (Poorjoy's Asylum, Vaults of Atziri), Map fragments
reward_types.best_for: Sustaining map pool; Kirac mission progression
reward_types.notes: Best stacked for atlas completion. Scales well with quantity/packsize.

reward_types.name: Unique Items
reward_types.description: Drops unique items biased toward the map's item level range.
reward_types.high_value_drops: Specific build-enabling uniques vary by league economy
reward_types.best_for: Target farming build-defining uniques at high item level
reward_types.notes: RNG-heavy. Best combined with strong quantity/rarity bonuses.

reward_types.name: Divination Cards
reward_types.description: Drops divination cards, including zone-specific and delirium-specific cards.
reward_types.high_value_drops: The Doctor, Brother's Stash, Seven Years Bad Luck (for Mirror)
reward_types.best_for: Divination card farming strategies; completing card sets
reward_types.notes: Card drops are zone-specific. Check which cards drop in your target map first.

reward_types.name: Scarabs
reward_types.description: Drops scarabs of all tiers and mechanic types.
reward_types.best_for: Building scarab supply for mechanic-stacking strategies
reward_types.notes: Scarabs are highly liquid currency in most leagues.

reward_types.name: Fossils
reward_types.description: Drops fossils and resonators from the Delve league.
reward_types.best_for: Fossil crafting setups; selling high-tier fossils
reward_types.notes: Lucent and Faceted fossils are consistently valuable for specific crafts.

reward_types.name: Fragments
reward_types.description: Drops map fragments, Divine Vessels, Sacrifice fragments, and boss keys.
reward_types.high_value_drops: Shaper/Elder fragments, Uber Elder fragments, Simulacrum Splinters
reward_types.best_for: Boss material farming; Simulacrum splinter accumulation
reward_types.notes: Simulacrum Splinters drop from ANY delirium cluster type, but Fragments type biases toward them.

reward_types.name: Armour
reward_types.description: Drops body armours, helmets, gloves, and boots of varied base types.
reward_types.high_value_drops: High item level rare bases for crafting (ilvl 86+ Titan Gauntlets, etc.)
reward_types.best_for: Farming high-ilvl bases for crafting or selling
reward_types.notes: Value depends on current meta bases. Check trade prices before committing.

reward_types.name: Weapons
reward_types.description: Drops weapons across all types (swords, bows, wands, staves, etc.).
reward_types.high_value_drops: High item level rare bases; Influence weapon bases at ilvl 86+
reward_types.best_for: Farming weapon bases for crafting or selling
reward_types.notes: Same caveat as Armour — check base prices each league.

reward_types.name: Gems
reward_types.description: Drops skill gems, including high-level and quality gems.
reward_types.high_value_drops: Level 21 gems, 23% quality gems, Awakened support gems (rare)
reward_types.best_for: Levelling valuable gems; stocking support gems to sell
reward_types.notes: Level 21 / 20% quality gems are common farming targets. Good paired with Beyond maps.

reward_types.name: Harbinger
reward_types.description: Biases drops toward Harbinger currency: Shards, Annulment Shards, Exalted Shards.
reward_types.high_value_drops: Ancient Orbs, Orbs of Horizons, Harbinger Orbs, Exalted Orb Shards
reward_types.best_for: Shard farming; converting shards into full orbs
reward_types.notes: Exalted Shards (16 = 1 Exalted Orb) are consistently valuable. Ancient Orbs can reroll unique items.
